com.zwo

类 ASICameraProperty

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.zwo.ASICameraProperty
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    android.os.Parcelable

    public class ASICameraProperty
extends java.lang.Object
implements android.os.Parcelable
    Created by Jiang Rui on 2016/11/23.

    • 嵌套类概要

      • 从接口继承的嵌套类/接口 android.os.Parcelable

        android.os.Parcelable.ClassLoaderCreator<T>, android.os.Parcelable.Creator<T>

      构造器和说明

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明

      the max height of the camera
      long getMaxWidth() 
      int getMechanicalShutter() 
      java.lang.String getName() 
      double getPixelSize() 
      int getST4Port() 
      int[] getSupportBins()
      1 means bin1 which is supported by every camera, 2 means bin 2 etc.. 0 is the end of supported binning method
      int[] getSupportedVideoFormat()
      this array will content with the support output format type.
      void setName(java.lang.String name) 
      void writeToParcel(android.os.Parcel dest, int flags)

                         int cameraID,
                         long maxHeight,
                         long maxWidth,

    • 方法详细资料

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()
        返回:
        the name of the camera, you can display this to the UI

      • setName

        public void setName(java.lang.String name)

      • getCameraID

        public int getCameraID()
        返回:
        this is used to control everything of the camera in other functions

      • getIsColorCam

        public int getIsColorCam()

      • getBayerPattern

        public int getBayerPattern()

      • getSupportBins

        public int[] getSupportBins()
        1 means bin1 which is supported by every camera, 2 means bin 2 etc.. 0 is the end of supported binning method
        返回:

      • getSupportedVideoFormat

        public int[] getSupportedVideoFormat()
        this array will content with the support output format type. ASI_IMG_END is the end of supported video format
        返回:

      • getPixelSize

        public double getPixelSize()
        返回:
        the pixel size of the camera, unit is um. such like 5.6um

      • getMechanicalShutter

        public int getMechanicalShutter()

      • getST4Port

        public int getST4Port()

      • getMaxWidth

        public long getMaxWidth()
        返回:
        the max width of the camera

        public long getMaxHeight()
        the max height of the camera
        返回:
